query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'pipelines' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'pipelines' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE	COLUMN_DEFAULT
id	int	NULL
tenantId	int	NULL
name	varchar	NULL
isDefault	tinyint	0
createdAt	timestamp	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
updatedAt	timestamp	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
